# khai science index

The forward map: **science → engine**. Inverted from the Origin table every engine's `REFERENCES.md` carries, so navigation and the reverse warrant share one source and cannot drift. 107 engines, 417 scholars. Of the engines, 4 are composites (_italicised_): their Origin tables carry the integrative warrant of the layer read, while each corner's primary science stays its atom's.
